overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city. The vehicle travels from elevated highways down through underpasses into dense commercial districts with prominent holographic advertisements and neon signage.

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily along the rain-slicked highway, maintaining speed while passing under illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens spanning across the highway showing various advertisements
metal safety barriers lining the left side of the elevated highway
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and buildings visible on the horizon through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, with the vehicle cruising under large overhead digital billboards. The road stretches ahead through the misty atmosphere, with distant city lights twinkling through the haze and sparse traffic visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with overhead directional signage

events.description: vehicle takes the exit ramp and begins a sustained rightward curve
passing under concrete overpass structure into a more enclosed roadway section

agents.ego_description: navigating the exit ramp curve, slowing slightly while following the road's bend to the right

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi merging from the right lane, moving parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: large highway gantry with illuminated directional arrows and destination text
concrete support structure spanning the roadway with attached signage
concrete dividers separating the exit ramp from the main highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp, curving rightward under large directional signage gantries. The environment becomes more enclosed as it passes beneath concrete overpasses, with the city lights shifting to the left as the road bends. Traffic increases slightly with vehicles merging from adjacent lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass and lower city streets

events.description: entering underpass with significantly reduced natural light, relying on artificial tunnel lighting
emerging from underpass into lower urban street level with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: driving through the dimly lit underpass section, maintaining steady speed on the wet descent

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the underpass with embedded lighting fixtures
rough concrete walls lining the underpass passage
tall concrete walls supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into a covered underpass section where artificial lighting replaces the neon glow above. Concrete walls and ceiling enclose the roadway, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere. The segment ends as the vehicle emerges back into the open at a lower street level, with urban buildings now visible flanking the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with prominent neon signage

events.description: entering the Los Osos commercial district with large neon signs visible
approaching intersection with traffic lights and increased vehicle density

agents.ego_description: cruising through the commercial street, passing illuminated storefronts and palm trees while navigating moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan moving ahead, brake lights illuminating in the rain

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading 'LOS OSOS' mounted on a building facade
multi-story commercial structures with illuminated windows and ground-floor shops
tall palm trees lining the right side of the commercial street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into the Los Osos commercial district, characterized by prominent cyan neon signage and palm-lined streets. Multi-story commercial buildings flank the road, their windows glowing against the rainy night. Traffic density increases as the vehicle approaches a signalized intersection, with other vehicles' brake lights reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with multiple holographic advertisements

events.description: navigating through the busy roundabout intersection with multiple vehicles
passing the Imperia Mall entrance with dense neon signage and plaza area

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the busy commercial intersection, navigating around other vehicles while passing prominent neon landmarks

notable_agents.action: black SUV entering the roundabout from the right, yielding to traffic
red sports car accelerating through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading 'Pacifica Cab' with stylized lettering
large illuminated sign for 'IMPERIA MALL' above the shopping complex entrance
circular plaza area with central fountain structure and surrounding traffic flow

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense commercial intersection featuring the prominent Pacifica Cab and Imperia Mall signage. The area features a roundabout plaza with a central fountain, surrounded by heavy vehicle traffic and dense neon advertising. The scene is vibrant with multiple light sources reflecting off the rain-soaked roads as the vehicle navigates through the bustling cyberpunk city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that descends from a misty elevated highway into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a commercial district. It begins on a rain-soaked overpass cruising beneath massive digital billboards, before curving rightward down an exit ramp as the open horizon narrows under concrete overpasses. The camera then plunges into a covered underpass where artificial lights replace the city glow, creating a tunnel-like enclosure before emerging at a lower street level. As the vehicle enters the Los Osos district, the environment opens up into palm-lined streets flanked by glowing multi-story buildings and cyan neon signage. The journey finally culminates in a dense commercial intersection, navigating through a bustling roundabout plaza filled with heavy traffic and the brilliant reflections of Pacifica Cab and Imperia Mall advertisements on the wet pavement.
